commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f67021f27b77fbccf974722f00461c6e089d0d2f)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Codex reset-credit models and OAuth fetching, threads the snapshot into menu-card and CLI rendering, and adds decoder plus menu-model tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers: source inspection shows the model returns “1 Available” while the new test expects “1 manual reset available”, and the sectioned menu renders reset credits only in the metrics-present branch. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker includes maintainer auth-provider/product approval, with concrete code findings to repair before merge.

target.title: feat: Add Codex rate-limit reset credits to menu card
target.body: ## Summary This PR surfaces Codex rate-limit reset credits inside the CodexBar menu. It fetches from the `/wham/rate-limit-reset-credits` endpoint and seamlessly integrates the available reset count and its subsequent expiry into the `Usage` section, alongside existing metrics. This addresses the missing visibility of rate-limit resets, resolving #1633. ## Changes Implemented - **Core Models & Fetching:** Added `CodexRateLimitResetCreditsSnapshot` and utilized `CodexOAuthUsageFetcher` to perform the fetch with a custom ISO-8601 decoder for robust time parsing. - **Provider Pipeline:** Safely baked the fetch into `CodexProviderDescriptor` using sequential await handling to respect the codebase's concurrency guidelines (no sibling `async let` for optional fetches). - **UI Integration:** Rendered `CodexResetCreditsContent` within the usage block. It features an `HStack` displaying "Limit Reset Credits" and the available count, with an expiry indicator ("Next expires...") positioned discreetly below. - **User Preference Parity:** The expiry text natively responds to the user's `resetTimeDisplayStyle` (Absolute clock time vs. Countdown). - **CLI Parity:** Added the reset credit readout to the `codexbar usage` CLI command. ## Commands Run - `make test` (Sharded swift tests passing) - `./Scripts/compile_and_run.sh --test` (Live bundle and UI runtime verification passing) ## Screenshots / GIFs ## References Fixes https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar/issues/1633
target.author: rogdex24
